description: Configure a custom alert profile in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus (http://localhost:8081) using credentials 'admin'/'Admin@2024' to detect unauthorized administrative access. Create a new Alert Profile named 'WiFi_DC_Logon_Violation' with Critical severity in the Logon category. The profile must trigger when the Client IP Address starts with '192.168.50'. Set the alert message to 'Unauthorized access detected from Wi-Fi subnet'.
